forecasts.reasoning:
Based on evidence as of May 13, 2025, the probability is high for several reasons:

(1) Active peace process: Peace talks are scheduled for May 15, 2025 in Istanbul, Turkey. Major diplomatic negotiations of this magnitude typically require high-level coordination between leaders.

(2) Direct engagement: Zelenskyy publicly invited Trump to meet in Turkey "this week" on May 13, and Trump had floated traveling there on May 12. This indicates active diplomatic momentum.

(3) Historical pattern: Trump and Zelenskyy have had regular contact in 2025 - including an Oval Office meeting (Feb 28), a phone call (March 19), an in-person meeting (late April), and now the proposed Turkey meeting.

(4) Mutual necessity: Trump is leading the peace process and Zelenskyy needs U.S. support. With talks imminent (May 15), coordination via phone call is highly likely to finalize details or discuss strategy.

(5) No evidence of rupture: Despite tensions and Trump's frustration expressed on May 11, both sides are actively engaged in the peace process, making communication likely.

The forecast window (May 12-June 15, 2025) covers the immediate lead-up to and aftermath of the Turkey talks, a period when leader-to-leader communication would be most needed. I estimate 75% probability they speak by phone in this window.
